key.name: last-brightness
key.description: The last known brightness value (0.0 to 1.0). -1.0 means unset.

key.name: restore-on-startup
key.description: If true, restores the last saved brightness value on login

key.name: indicator-position
key.description: Position of the indicator in Quick Settings (left, right, default)

key.name: interval
key.description: Interval in seconds to check for brightness changes

key.name: indicator-style
key.description: Choose between Standalone Panel Button or Quick Settings Integration

key.name: idle-timeout-enabled
key.description: When enabled, screen will blank after idle period

key.name: idle-timeout-seconds
key.description: Time in seconds before screen blanks on idle (60=1min, 300=5min, 600=10min, etc)

key.name: idle-timeout-action
key.description: Action to perform on idle: 'overlay' for black overlay, 'dbus' for D-Bus screen off

key.name: screen-test-action
key.description: Action to use for manual debug screen testing

key.name: screen-test-sequence
key.description: Increment to request a new manual screen test from the shell process
